title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: Crypto users wary as Anthropic releases Claude Mythos with safeguards
summary: Venture capitalist Simon Dedic said Anthropic’s latest AI models drop the cost and skill needed to find crypto exploits to “basically zero.”

title: 在股市升空的SpaceX，可能是馬斯克迄今最大的一次豪賭
summary: SpaceX正籌備進軍股市，此舉可能改變公司發展、整體市場格局以及馬斯克的財富版圖。

title: How Justin Ernest invested nearly $500M into hot startups without a traditional VC fund
summary: Instead of spending a year raising a formal venture fund, the Sabertooth VC founder used a captive network of LPs to invest in startups like Anthropic, Anduril, and SpaceX.

title: Anthropic’s Fable 5 can make weirdly fun video games with the click of a button
summary: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 is going to be a big hit with the web's vibe coders.

title: Anthropic Rolls Out Claude Mythos 5 AI Model—Along With the Safer Fable 5 for the Public
summary: Anthropic has released a full version of its cybersecurity-centric Claude Mythos model—along with a safer version for the general public.

title: Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5 is a version of Mythos the public can access today
summary: Anthropic is releasing Claude Fable 5, its first Mythos-class model available to the public. The model comes with guardrails that block responses in high-risk areas like cybersecurity and biology.

title: It’s not FAANG anymore. It’s MANGOS.
summary: With SpaceX, Anthropic, and OpenAI all eyeing massive public debuts, the tech industry may soon have a new class of corporate overlords — and a new acronym to match. Say goodbye to FAANG and hello to MANGOS.

title: MiCA architect says EU should prioritize tokenization over DeFi rules
summary: One of MiCA's architects said he sees no need to regulate DeFi as the European Commission gathers feedback on the framework's future.

title: Humanity Protocol Loses $36M After Private Keys 'Compromised,' Token Crashes 73%
summary: The decentralized identity protocol said a compromised employee's laptop let attackers seize its bridges and mint tokens at will.

title: OpenAI Confirms Confidential IPO Filing, Keeps Timing Open
summary: The ChatGPT maker says it has filed paperwork for a potential public offering but may remain private while it pursues other priorities.

title: FCC lets Amazon Leo miss deployment deadline with temporary spectrum penalty
summary:
